name: getSignalName
title: getSignalName
syntax: char[] getSignalName(caplCanMessage* msg, dword startBit); // form 1
char[] getSignalName(caplAutosarPDU* pdu, dword startBit); // form 2
description: Finds out the signal name at a specified start index inside a CAN message (form 1).
Finds out the signal name at a specified start index inside a PDU (form 2).

parameters.name: startBit
parameters.description: First bit of the signal of the AUTOSAR PDU or CAN message.

return:
Returns the signal name at a given start index inside a CAN message. Start index is defined in DBC Editor (form 1).
Returns signal name at a given start index inside a PDU. Start index is defined with AUTOSAR Explorer (form 2).
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
